title: peucedanum officinale subsp. italicum
intro: Peucedanum officinale subsp. italicum, also known as Italian masterwort, is a subspecies of the Peucedanum officinale plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Peucedanum officinale subsp. italicum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health concerns.
